steps.title: Identify what happens when currents slow down
steps.content: The passage explains that slowing rough currents produces an environment where animals can safely shelter. The blank must describe what kind of environment results.

steps.title: Choose the word for that resulting environment
steps.content:
Tranquil expresses calm and peace—exactly what emerges when dangerous currents are slowed.

The other three don't fit: dangerous contradicts the protective solution, imaginative has no connection to environmental properties, and surprising doesn't follow from the cause given.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
